name_en: Exclusive Background Dynamic Chip Top-tier Original M13105 This CarryAll Dark Medium bag is crafted from soft lambskin to create a chic, relaxed silhouette, adding a striking touch to 2025 Kazuki Takamatsu 33 Colors Spring/Summer runway looks. Polished metal hardware contrasts with the good tactile micro-crepe texture. Ample space accommodates various daily items, making it a perfect travel companion.
name_cn:

(L x H x W)
